title: Jia Zhang-Ke: Nothing brings more freedom than filmmaking
description: In a pioneering new collaboration, the BBC, in partnership with Rolex, will use its unparalleled reach to bring the best arts and culture to audiences worldwide. Rolex's long-standing commitment to the arts, through its Perpetual Arts Initiative, is coupled with the BBC's storytelling heritage to support and promote artistic excellence and the transmission of artistic knowledge. This is Arts in Motion, a long-term joint project to enable and highlight creative ambition on a global scale.
